result.summary: Added Morph as a fresh publisher-contact target, regenerated primary-repo-flat discovery, refreshed the canonical publisher packet, and rewrote the execution board/lane snapshot so the next truthful slot can use a new Codeberg-first comparison target.

verification.distribution_lane_reason: The post-cooldown StackOverflow slot already burned without a fresh outcome, and the other external lanes are still in-flight; hold for a genuinely different executable window instead of rerunning the same demand-capture search.
